texto: I like to be with my children - not just quality time, but quantity time. I like to be there in the morning when they're waking up. I like to practice piano with them. I like to be there at supper. I need them as much as they need me. Working is not as important to me as being a mother is.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jane Kaczmarek: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I like to be with my children - not just quality time, but quantity time. I like to be there in t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, time, children pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e trabalho.

texto: I was never a glamour puss whose career was really based on a look or an attitude. I've been basically playing the same parts I am at 55 that I was at 35. I get cast as strong women, and that can be a mother or a judge or anything.
explicacao: Citação de Jane Kaczmarek sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I was never a glamour puss whose career was really based on a look or an attitude. I've been basi…” articula trabalho, women, mother em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como mother e strong.

texto: You can make sure your kids make their beds and hang up their clothes and put their dishes in the dishwasher when you're the one calling the shots. So, parenting alone, for me anyway, I think is almost easier, being single.
explicacao: Citação de Jane Kaczmarek sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You can make sure your kids make their beds and hang up their clothes and put their dishes in the…” articula reflexao, alone, me em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como me e think.
